/home/lt/tspi_SDK/buildroot/output/rockchip_rk3566/host/bin/aarch64-buildroot-linux-gnu-g++ CMakeFiles/rk_cmake_project.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rk_cmake_project.dir/src/rk_mpi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rk_cmake_project.dir/src/rknn/utils/file_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/rk_cmake_project.dir/src/rknn/utils/image_drawing.c.o CMakeFiles/rk_cmake_project.dir/src/rknn/utils/image_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/rk_cmake_project.dir/src/rknn/yolov8/postprocess.cc.o CMakeFiles/rk_cmake_project.dir/src/rknn/yolov8/yolov8.cc.o -o rk_cmake_project   -L/home/lt/rk_V8/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lt/rk_V8/lib -lpthread -lrockit -lrt_test_comm -lopencv_core -lopencv_highgui -lopencv_imgproc -lopencv_imgcodecs -lrknnrt -lrga -lturbojpeg -lmk_api
